title: Scan and Turn - Quick Decision Drill
summary: A drill to hammer home shoulder check, where the objective is to complete a fast turn and pass to a player called out as the pass is arriving.
setupHtml: Groups of four (two of each color) on cones set up as shown in diagram (basically in a Y pattern).  Make sure the inside player is not waiting for the ball but running to meet the pass.
instructionsHtml:
1.player A with ball passes in to teammate (B) and quickly calls one of the two colors (blue or green, assuming those are pinnie colors)
2.Player B runs to meet the pass, checking shoulder before ball arrives
3.Player B quickly turns and sends the ball to the correct target based on color called.
4.Return the ball up to A quickly to repeat
Rotate players every 1 min (A->B, B->C, C->D, D->A)
progressionsHtml:
1) Pass to opposite color
2) Color targets quietly change sides to re-inforce shoulder check
3) Can add a third cue of “man on” (return pass)
emphasisHtml:
Check your shoulder. Scanning, quick decision making.

Also, run towards your pass  (don’t just stand waiting for ball, don’t enter the space too soon).

diagram.alt: Scan and Turn - Quick Decision Drill diagram
